TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Carmen Argenziano kawas tay 1943, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 10, Carmen Argenziano, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux ru mincyogun Carmen Argenziano htgan na ryax maki Sharon, Pennsylvania. m'rkays beh Sharpsville.cyugal laqi nha,sazing laqi mlikuy ru qutux laqi kneril qnyatan nya. semong nya balay ga Jacob Carter/Selmak maki Stargate SG-1. wal mhuqil 2019 kawas 2 byacing 10 ryax(pitu pgan magan kawas minqyanux nya). cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨarmen arɣenziano kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, ʦ~ʨarmen arɣenziano, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qjanux ru minʦ~ʨjoɣun ʦ~ʨarmen arɣenziano ħtɣan na rjax maki s~ɕħaron, penns~ɕjl*ania. mʔrkajs~ɕ βeħ s~ɕħarps~ɕ*ille.ʦ~ʨjuɣal laqi nħa,s~ɕaziŋ laqi mlikuj ru qutux laqi kneril qnjatan nja. s~ɕemoŋ nja βalaj ɣa *aʦ~ʨoβ ʦ~ʨarter/s~ɕelmak maki s~ɕtarɣate s~ɕɣ-*. wal mħuqil **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax(pitu pɣan maɣan kawas~ɕ minqjanux nja). ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: Carmen Argenziano kawas tay 1943, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 10, Carmen Argenziano, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux ru mincyogun Carmen Argenziano htgan na ryax maki Sharon, Pennsylvania. m'rkays beh Sharpsville.cyugal laqi nha,sazing laqi mlikuy ru qutux laqi kneril qnyatan nya. semong nya balay ga Jacob Carter/Selmak maki Stargate SG-1. wal mhuqil 2019 kawas 2 byacing 10 ryax(pitu pgan magan kawas minqyanux nya). cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨarmen arɣenziano kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, ʦ~ʨarmen arɣenziano, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qjanux ru minʦ~ʨjoɣun ʦ~ʨarmen arɣenziano ħtɣan na rjax maki s~ɕħaron, penns~ɕjl*ania. mʔrkajs~ɕ βeħ s~ɕħarps~ɕ*ille.ʦ~ʨjuɣal laqi nħa,s~ɕaziŋ laqi mlikuj ru qutux laqi kneril qnjatan nja. s~ɕemoŋ nja βalaj ɣa *aʦ~ʨoβ ʦ~ʨarter/s~ɕelmak maki s~ɕtarɣate s~ɕɣ-*. wal mħuqil **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax(pitu pɣan maɣan kawas~ɕ minqjanux nja). ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
